sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54821" key="kataplana/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταπλᾰνάω</orth>, strengthd. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πλανάω</foreign>, <sense id="n54821.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">deceive, mislead, App.Prov.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:1:50" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.50</biblScope> </bibl> (cod.
